# Clement Leow

> Game designer and aspiring studio founder based in Singapore. Creating experiences through the power of play, and documenting the journey through devlogs and project showcases.

## About

Clement Leow is a game designer working toward starting his own studio focused on narrative-driven interactive experiences. He graduated from DigiPen Singapore with a Bachelor's in User Experience and Game Design, interned at Ubisoft Singapore on Assassin's Creed Odyssey, and served as a Cyber Security Specialist with the Singapore Armed Forces. He currently works as a Product Manager at Workato while building his portfolio through game jams and personal projects.

Recent highlights include winning 1st place at the SIT x Century Games Jam 2026 with FedUp (a local-multiplayer co-opetitive Tetris-in-a-truck game) and building Seagrass Guide, a conservation PWA, aboard the OceanXplorer at the OceanX Education Hackathon.

## Looking for

- Collaborators for game jams and side projects
- Producer / designer roles at studios working on interesting projects
- Conversations about games, design, and the industry

## Content

- [Blog](https://clementlsw.com/blog): Devlogs, learnings, and thoughts on game design and development
- [Projects](https://clementlsw.com/projects): Games and interactive prototypes, with devlogs for each
- [About](https://clementlsw.com/about): Background, education, and what Clement is looking for
- [Now](https://clementlsw.com/now): What Clement is currently working on
- [RSS feed](https://clementlsw.com/rss.xml)
- [Sitemap](https://clementlsw.com/sitemap-index.xml)
